title: Proclamation No. 41, s. 1936
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 41

RESERVING FOR THE EXCLUSIVE USE OF THE NON-CHRISTIANS A PARCEL OF LAND IN THE BARRIO OF DULANGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BACO, PROVINCE OF MINDORO, ISLAND OF MINDORO.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-two of Act Numbered twenty-eight hundred and seventy-four, as amended, I hereby reserve for the exclusive use of the non-Christians, under the administration of the Director of the Bureau of Non-Christian Tribes, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following-described parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Dulangan, municipality of Baco, Province of Mindoro, Island of Mindoro, and more particularly described in the Bureau of Lands plan Ir-357, to wit:

Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Ir-357, S. 89ْ 20’ W. 11,042.56 m. more or less, from M. B. M. No. 10, Calapan cadastre, thence N. 16ْ 47’ W. 1,078.02 m. to point 2; N. 22ْ 43’ W. 5.13 m. to point 3; n. 45ْ 01’ E. 89.93 m. to point 4; N. 54ْ 09’ E. 36.28 m. to pint 5; S. 80ْ 03’ E. 80ْ 38’ E. 92.28 m. to point 7; S. 70ْ 45’ E. 106.60 m. to point 8; S. 78ْ 19’ E. 183.81 m. to point 9; S. 59ْ 01’ E. 134.77 m. to point 10; S. 89ْ 07’ E. 40.86 m. to point 11; S. 63ْ 10’ E. 111.49 m. to point 12; S. 67ْ 07’ E. 109.23 m. to point 13; S. 40ْ 10’ E. 136.68 m. to point 14; W. 61ْ 59’ E. 108.53 m. to point 15; S. 30ْ 08’ E. 83.17 m. to point 16; S. 36ْ 18’ E. 113.30 m. to point 17; S. 52ْ 29’ E. 139.34 m. to point 18; S. 73ْ 55’ E. 79.95 m. to point 21; S. 13ْ 44’ E. 104.38 m. to point 22; S. 62ْ 56’ 43.88 m. to point 23; S. 3ْ 59’ W. 92.24 m. to point 24; S. 42ْ 32’ E. 120.60 m. to point 25; S. 85ْ 57’ E. 87.36 m. to point 26; S. 48ْ 23’ E. 106.70 m. to point 27; N. 89ْ 37’ E. 115.63 m. to point 28; N. 62ْ 55’ E. 81.25 m. to point 29; S. 37ْ 23’ E. 58.47 m. to point 30; S. 8ْ 27’ E. 92.57 m. to point 31; S. 37ْ 50’ E. 113.72 m. to point 32; S. 3ْ 00’ E. 37.55 m. to point 33; S. 15ْ 16’ W. 70.72 m. to point 34; S. 3ْ 27’ W. 82.45 m. to point 35; S. 28ْ 58’ W. 63.86 m. to point 36; S. 8ْ 06’ W. 30.00 m. to point 37; S. 2ْ 18’ W. 95.66 m. to point 38; S. 9ْ 59’ W. 155.51 m. to point 39; S. 53ْ 30’ W. 96.42 m. to point 40; N. 67ْ 52’ W. 17.00 m. to point 41; N. 71ْ 41’ W. 149.72 m. to point 42; S. 12ْ 33’ W. 71.00 m. to point 43; N. 73ْ 15’ W. 77.47 m. to point 44; N. 87ْ 01’ W. 67.89 m. to point 45; N. 27ْ 45’ W. 61.44 m. to point 46; N. 55ْ 23’ W. 143.99 m. to point 47; N. 84ْ 21’ W. 92.41 m. to point 48; N. 1ْ 39’ W. 115.66 m. to point 49; N. 53ْ 31’ W. 56.78 m. to point 50; N. 20ْ 23’ E. 54.33 m. to point 51; S. 88ْ 04’ W. 107.89 m. to point 52; N. 69ْ 21’ W. 136.55 m. to point 53; S. 83ْ 38’ W. 160.23 m. to point 54; N. 78ْ 09’ W. 124.48 m. to point 55; S. 89ْ 50’ W. 66.76 m. to point 56; N. 30ْ 49’ W. 73.59 m. to point 57; N. 61ْ 18’ W. 95.64 m. to point 58; N. 38ْ 22’ W. 84.43 m. to point 59; N. 48ْ 45’ W. 92.05 m. to point 60; N. 21ْ 20’ W. 58.25 m. to point 61; N. 66ْ 48’ W. 95.57 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 187.6871 hectares.

Point 1, B. L. cylindrical concrete monument; points 2 and 10, crosses on trees; points 25 and 30, galvanized iron spikes in crosses on trees.

Bounded on the northeast, by Carayrayan River; on the east and south, by Apaparay River; on the southwest, by Apaparay River and unclassified public forest (excluded); and on the northwest, by Carayrayan River.

Bearings true. Declination, 1ْ 02’ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Ir.-357.

Surveyed, November 17-21, 1931. Approved, August 21, 1933.

NOTE.—All corners not otherwise described are stakes.

Amended to exclude portion inside unclassified public forest.

Approved: October 16, 1935.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-sixth day of February, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-six, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the first.

[SEAL]

President of the Philippines

By the President:

Secretary of the Interior
